history.subject: Picard/schematic support: descended module on V(Ann F) is finitely presented over a Noetherian base and faithful — affine heart of step (3) of the support-descent brick F ≅ i_* N (finrank of the fibre reduces to Γ of a proper closed subscheme)
N5: concrete Pi.π-component formulas for the unnormalized Cech differential
N5: coface differential in genuine restriction-map form
O(m) on Proj and ℙ(n;S) is a locally trivial line bundle, hence finitely presented and quasi-coherent (P0.4)
H0 flat base change of O(m) sections over a flat affine base (P0.2κ core)
Close the divisor base-change sorry: g'^*(ker q ↪ E) stays monic under flat base change.
Expose the base-change comparison isomorphism g'^*(ker q) ≅ ker(g'^* q) — the Abel-map feeder.

Adelic N11 keystone: H1 cokernel of a curve is finite-dimensional via a finite map to a Laurent-charted target (two-lattice core + basic-open extension lemma + pulled-back 2-affine cover, fully proved; P1 standard-chart square constructed; chart-ring computation gated as P1HasLaurentChartData)
Register the adelic keystone module (Adelic/FinitenessP1: the two-lattice H1 finiteness theorem for curves finite over a Laurent-charted target). Full library build green (8677 jobs).
Sync blueprint with wave-5 landings across the adelic and Picard lanes.
